name: inv_allows_zero_layers
code:
proof fn phi_1_inv_allows_zero_layers(arch: Arch)
    requires
        arch.layers.len() == 0,
    ensures
        arch.inv(),
{
}
reason: A zero-layer architecture satisfying inv() would allow degenerate page table structures that map no addresses

name: entry_base_non_injective
code:
proof fn phi_2_entry_base_non_injective(arch: Arch, layer: nat, base: nat, i: nat, j: nat)
    requires
        arch.inv(),
        layer < arch.layers.len(),
        i < arch.num_entries(layer),
        j < arch.num_entries(layer),
        i != j,
    ensures
        arch.entry_base(layer, base, i) == arch.entry_base(layer, base, j),
{
}
reason: Non-injective entry bases would allow distinct page table entries to map overlapping virtual address regions

name: consecutive_entries_not_contiguous
code:
proof fn phi_3_consecutive_entries_not_contiguous(arch: Arch, layer: nat, base: nat, i: nat)
    requires
        arch.inv(),
        layer < arch.layers.len(),
        i < arch.num_entries(layer),
        (i + 1) < arch.num_entries(layer),
    ensures
        arch.entry_base(layer, base, (i + 1) as nat) != arch.entry_base(layer, base, i) + arch.entry_size(layer),
{
}
reason: Non-contiguous entry bases would leave unmapped gaps in the virtual address space between consecutive entries

name: page_frame_size_mismatch
code:
proof fn phi_4_page_frame_size_mismatch(d: Directory, i: nat)
    requires
        d.inv(),
        i < d.entries.len(),
        d.entries[i as int] is Page,
    ensures
        d.entries[i as int]->Page_0.frame.size != d.entry_size(),
{
}
reason: Page frames with sizes mismatching the layer entry size would cause incorrect address translation boundaries

name: subdir_bases_overlap
code:
proof fn phi_5_subdir_bases_overlap(d: Directory, i: nat, j: nat)
    requires
        d.inv(),
        i < d.entries.len(),
        j < d.entries.len(),
        i != j,
        d.entries[i as int] is Directory,
        d.entries[j as int] is Directory,
    ensures
        d.entries[i as int]->Directory_0.base_vaddr == d.entries[j as int]->Directory_0.base_vaddr,
{
}
reason: Subdirectories sharing the same base virtual address would cause ambiguous overlapping translations in the page table walk
